Showing Policy

  • → By appointment only — minimum 24-hour notice
  • → Listing agent must accompany all showings
  • → Schedule via ShowingTime / ShowingsPlus
  • → Submit application as a single PDF (CAR application, credit report, proof of income)
  • → Only complete applications reviewed
